title: hieracium murorum subsp. distichanthelum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. distichanthelum is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, specifically a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its distinctive leaves and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. distichanthelum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium murorum subsp. distichanthelum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
